title: Phoenix Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Phoenix with a Z-Score of +3.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Phoenix is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.0 GG. 
 The low humidity of 11% and moderate wind speed of 11.3 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the high CDD value shows significant cooling degree days.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
